description: OpenAPI 2.0/3.0 spec input via REST API fetch and file drop

specs.description: Fetch an OpenAPI 3.0 JSON spec from a URL
specs.given: A publicly accessible URL serving a valid OpenAPI 3.0 JSON document
specs.then: Returns a ResolvedSpec with format 'openapi-3.0', fully resolved $ref, and extracted title/version metadata

specs.description: Fetch an OpenAPI 2.0 (Swagger) JSON spec from a URL
specs.given: A URL serving a valid Swagger 2.0 JSON document with 'swagger: "2.0"' field
specs.then: Returns a ResolvedSpec with format 'openapi-2.0' and resolved document

specs.description: Parse a dropped YAML OpenAPI spec file
specs.given: A string containing valid OpenAPI 3.0 YAML content and filename 'petstore.yaml'
specs.then: Returns a ResolvedSpec with the YAML parsed to JSON, format detected, and metadata extracted

specs.description: Parse a dropped JSON OpenAPI spec file
specs.given: A string containing valid OpenAPI 3.0 JSON content and filename 'api.json'
specs.then: Returns a ResolvedSpec identical to what fromUrl would produce for the same content

specs.description: File drop zone accepts dragged files in the web UI
specs.given: The web UI is loaded with the compare view visible
specs.when: A user drags an OpenAPI JSON file onto the 'Old response' input area
specs.then: The file content is read, parsed via SpecInputPort.fromFile(), and the resolved JSON populates the textarea

specs.description: URL fetch populates the textarea via server-side proxy
specs.given: The web UI is loaded and a URL input field is visible next to each textarea
specs.when: User pastes a URL and clicks 'Fetch'
specs.then: POST /api/fetch-spec is called, server fetches and resolves the spec, and the resolved JSON populates the textarea

specs.description: Invalid URL returns a descriptive error
specs.given: A URL that returns a 404 or non-JSON/YAML response
specs.then: Throws an error with message containing 'Failed to fetch spec' and the HTTP status code

specs.description: Malformed YAML is rejected with parse error
specs.given: A string containing invalid YAML (unclosed brackets, bad indentation)
specs.then: Throws an error with message containing 'Failed to parse' and does NOT pass malformed data to the domain

specs.description: File drop does not use innerHTML to render content
specs.given: A dropped file containing HTML/script tags in field values
specs.when: The file is processed and displayed in the textarea
specs.then: Content is set via textContent or value property only — no innerHTML, outerHTML, or insertAdjacentHTML is used

specs.given: An OpenAPI spec with a $ref pointing to a non-existent file or URL
specs.then: Throws an error with message containing '$ref resolution failed' rather than producing a partial document

specs.description: Neither OpenAPI 2.0 nor 3.0 document is rejected
specs.given: A valid JSON object that has no 'swagger' or 'openapi' field
specs.then: Throws an error with message containing 'Unsupported format' — only OpenAPI 2.0 and 3.0/3.1 are accepted

specs.given: An empty string as file content
specs.then: Throws an error with message containing 'Empty file' rather than crashing on JSON.parse

specs.description: Resolved spec flows through to diff and guide generation
specs.given: Two resolved OpenAPI specs (v1 and v2) with known field differences
specs.when: Both are passed to the diff pipeline via the web UI
specs.then: The diff results and migration guide reflect the actual schema changes between the two specs
